acceptance_criteria.text: Regardless of how many candidates/expansions are available, the final selected-file set never exceeds k+2k total files (system-wide invariant).
pytest agents/query/test_topic_selector_cap.py: feed an oversized candidate+expansion set, assert final result length == min(available, k+2k).
A file reachable both as a direct top-k selection and as an expansion neighbor of a different topic counts once toward the cap (dedup).
Directly-selected top-k files must not be silently dropped in favor of expansion neighbors when the pool exceeds the cap.

edge_cases: neighbor file_id colliding with a selected file_id
order preservation: selected (score-desc) first, then expansion order
